items.summary: YAN DIOMANDE has snubbed Liverpool and wants to join PSG, according to reports. The RB Leipzig star, 19, has chosen his next destination if a transfer is completed for big money this summer. items.title: Sunderland reject £8m Chelsea bid for Xhaka
items.summary: Sunderland say experienced midfielder Granit Xhaka is not for sale after rejecting an £8m bid for the player from Chelsea.

items.title: Sunderland REJECT disrespectful transfer bid from Chelsea for Granit Xhaka and won’t entertain any other offers
items.summary: SUNDERLAND issued a fierce hands-off warning to Chelsea after rejecting a £8m bid for Granit Xhaka. The Black Cats are adamant they have no plans to cash in on their Swiss skipper, 33, this summer. items.title: Wakefield claim last-gasp victory over Huddersfield
items.summary: Josh Rourke scored a dramatic last-gasp try to help Wakefield earn a 29-23 victory over Huddersfield following a back-and-forth Betfred Super League encounter at the DIY Kitchens Stadium.

items.title: Stokes' retirement cues chaotic finish as England teeter towards series defeat
items.summary: Ben Stokes took centre stage, in more ways than one, as the announcement of his international retirement dominated a quite remarkable fourth day's play of England's third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge.

items.title: 'Best thing for me' - Stokes reveals decisions behind dramatic retirement
items.summary: Ben Stokes insists retiring from international cricket is the “best thing” for him after sensationally confirming mid-match that England’s series decider with New Zealand would be his last.

items.title: France the team to beat? Chris Sutton predicts World Cup's last-32 matches
items.summary: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-32 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against DR Congo.

items.title: Tuchel praises Bellingham buy-in after another match-winning showing
items.summary: Thomas Tuchel praised Jude Bellingham's buy-in to the team ethic after another man-of-the-match performance from the 22-year-old drove England through to the knockout stages of the World Cup.
